Who We Are
Throwback is Recess for Grown-Ups

Throwback is an experiential wellness brand focused on one thing: FUN. Our events bring people together through nostalgic, team-oriented games that build real camaraderie — the kind that doesn't evaporate after a trust fall.

We evolved from a 'throwback'-themed NYC fitness studio where we had a unique approach to working out. Now we bring that same energy to team building events across the country, blending classic field day staples with our own original creations.

Every event is fully customizable — we'll work with you to build an itinerary that fits your group's vibe, energy level, and goals. Whether your team wants to flex their competitive muscles or keep it chill with brain teasers and trivia, we've got you covered.

The result? Your team laughing harder than they have in years, connecting in ways a conference room never could, and leaving with actual memories. Recess for everyone.

New York's Best Team Building Activity now hosts events across the country

With over 300 five-star reviews and clients including ClassPass, Morgan Stanley, Microsoft, Goldman Sachs, and Spotify — we've helped hundreds of teams play their way to better culture.

The Experience
How Your Event Comes Together
1

We Plan Together

Our team works with you ahead of the event to build a custom game itinerary — tailored to your group size, energy level, venue, and any special themes or goals you have in mind.

2

Meet at the Field

Gather at a local park or venue of your choice. Groups get split into teams and receive their team-colored bandanas — which everyone gets to keep as a souvenir.

3

Play 4–8 Games

Over two hours, your team competes in a curated lineup of games while our experienced coaches officiate, keep score, and keep the energy high throughout.

4

Champions Are Crowned

Coaches announce the winning team — and everyone goes home with new inside jokes, stronger connections, and a story worth telling at the next all-hands.

Our Activity Library
Dozens of Games. Zero Trust Falls.

Click any game to learn more. We have dozens more!

Activity levels are on a scale of 1–10 with 1 indicating no movement and 10 being the intensity of a fitness class.

🎨 Can be customized to incorporate your company’s branding, values & themes.

What's Included

✓Two full hours of Field Day fun
✓5–8 unique games curated for your group

✓Groups of 8 to 500+ accommodated

Client Love
Don't Take Our Word For It
"
We couldn't have dreamed up a better experience for the ClassPass team than our field day with Throwback! Over 150 employees participated, and it was the perfect way to bring all levels of our quickly-growing company together. By fostering social interaction, team building, and playful competition, Throwback created an effective platform for our team members to get to know each other outside of the office. Months later, everyone's still talking about it!
ClassPass
"
The summer interns and full-time employees thoroughly enjoyed their experiences, some calling it the highlight of their summer! Great way to bond outside of the office, would highly recommend using Throwback for any team building event!
Morgan Stanley
"
Highly recommend Throwback Fitness for a corporate field day. We reached out to them to organize a low-key summer team event under a reasonable budget. From planning to execution on the day of, they performed above our expectations. The games also required different skills/strengths and a little bit of luck at times, so no one team/person won them all, and importantly, folks of various fitness levels and age ranges were able to participate and have fun. Overall, a great experience and can't say enough nice things about Daniel and team.
Goldman Sachs
"
We enjoyed so much working with Throwback Fitness as part of our corporate offsite of almost 200 people. It was so much fun being outdoors playing a mix of exciting games while having the chance to connect with colleagues across different departments...making it an awesome team bonding activity!
Headspace
"
Throwback Fitness team has such variation and versatility in their games which makes everyone comfortable, involved and entertained and encourages desire to participate. Their kind gesture of capturing all memorable clicks throughout the event would be a treasure forever for our company. The process from communicating planning to execution to implementation couldn't have been smoother.
Gain Theory
"
Throwback Fitness was such a great part of our summer party! We all had a great time, and the activities were a perfect balance of mental and physical challenges.
Virgin
"
Throwback took something we were worried might feel forced and made it genuinely fun. People who never interact in the office were cheering each other on. The energy was incredible from start to finish — our team is still asking when we can do it again.
Corporate Client
"
I was skeptical about team building, but this was nothing like I expected. The coaches were amazing, the games were the right mix of competitive and hilarious, and our group of 200+ had zero awkward moments. Genuinely one of the best company events we've ever done.
Corporate Client
